summary: Enforce exact immutable tag pins and fail-closed release tag verification
description: Enforce exact immutable tag pins and fail-closed release tag verification
acceptance: A same-version checkout on the wrong commit is rejected for an immutable tag pin
Release preflight rejects a tag that does not dereference to HEAD
A deliberate local development override is explicit, visible, and never the default

evidence.summary: 57 pytest tests passed; release-check 0.3.1 passed local Linux/WSL verification and template pairing; exact same-version wrong-commit bootstrap rejection, doctor exact-ref reporting, annotated tag-to-HEAD enforcement, and explicit GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV=1 override verified; template commit 0a963e8.
